title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Google DeepMind researchers at the University of Cambridge used AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to accelerate the discovery of bacterial defense mechanisms against antibiotics. The AI-driven approach compressed analysis that once took years into minutes, addressing the global challenge of antimicrobial resistance.
